meaning: 不能否定的,不可争辩的;adj.不能反驳的
examples: The universe is a society of wilful personalities, not an irrefragable chain of cause and effect .
That the employees are the best wealth in the enterprise has been an irrefragable fact in this knowledge economy era.
No evidence, at once so slight and irrefragable, of a subtle disease that had long since begun to eat into the real substance of his character.
